'''Victor Jun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] who suffered from [[schizophrenia]], and he thought the voices in his head were those of gods and obeyed what they told him to do—which occasionally involved murder—and in turn, the gods gave him glimpses into their power. In reality, these "glimpses" were Jun using the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].
